title: cephalaria corniculata
intro: Cephalaria corniculata, also known as weeping cephalaria or goat's beard, is a flowering plant in the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cephalaria corniculata include its potential to treat respiratory infections, such as pneumonia and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Cephalaria corniculata can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
